svg.title: Clean Architecture layers within a single feature slice
svg.desc: Each feature is split into three layers: presentation with bloc and screens, domain with entities, abstract repositories, and usecases, and data with datasources, models, and concrete repositories. Source-code dependencies point inward toward the framework-free domain layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Bloc + freezed state layer work in this template?')
sendPrompt('How are screens structured in this template?')
sendPrompt('Why are domain entities pure Dart with no framework deps?')
sendPrompt('How do abstract repository interfaces enable dependency inversion here?')
sendPrompt('What does a use case look like in this template?')
sendPrompt('How do remote Retrofit and local ObjectBox datasources work together?')
sendPrompt('What are Freezed DTOs and toDomain() mappers in this template?')
sendPrompt('How does the concrete repository coordinate offline-first sync?')
